channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chicago man charged with arson and hate crime after cross burning in Grant Park
item.description: The cross burning in Grant Park was visible to anyone traveling on Columbus Drive.

item.title: How an Irish town is raising children without smartphones
item.description: Parents and educators in Greystones, Ireland, responded to rising childhood anxiety by removing phones from daily life.

item.title: Parent arrests under Trump administration trigger mental health crisis for children
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of children, many U.S. citizens, have been separated from a parent due to immigration enforcement.

item.title: Tropical Storm Arthur weakens but flash flooding threat remains
item.description: Arthur, the first named storm of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season, weakened to a post-tropical cyclone after landfall.
